holdings.infoBox: MMTM is an equity ETF with a total of 1482 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 7.39%, Apple at 6.89%, Amazon.com at 4.53%, NVIDIA at 3.50%, and Meta Platforms at 2.84%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 1500 Momentum Tilt ETF (MMTM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 1500 Positive Momentum Tilt index. The fund tracks a tiered index that weights securities from the S&P 1500 according to a combination of their market capitalization and their price momentum over the previous 12 months. MMTM was launched on Oct 24, 2012 and is issued by State Street.
